<!-- GENERATED from examples/*.txtar by cmd/gsx-examples — do not edit. -->

```gsx
package views

component Card(w int, userColor string) {
	<style>
		.card {
			width: @{ w }px;
			color: @{ userColor };
		}
	</style>
}
```

Renders:

```html
<style>.card{width: 12px;color: teal}</style>
```
